chinese_news.title: 增长停滞两年后，H&M重组全球架构，大中华区降级｜独家
chinese_news.summary:
文｜贺哲馨

编辑｜乔芊

36氪独家获悉，瑞典快时尚巨头H&M正在推进一场波及全球的组织架构调整：原本按地理划分的9大区域业务板块被打散，重新拆分为26个销售市场，并以市场表现为依据归入四个新设立的“洲级”事业部管辖。

大中华区在这轮调整中降级为26个销售市场之一，归属新成立的亚太洲级事业部（Continent Asia Pacific）管理。原大中华区总裁司懿德（Saed El-Achkar）将出任该事业部董事总经理（Managing Director），任命预计在6月25日集团半年报发布前后正式对外公布，新架构于7月1日落地运转。

除大中华区外，亚太事业部还管辖东南亚（总部吉隆坡）、东北亚（东京）、印度（班加罗尔）、澳大利亚和新西兰（悉尼）

chinese_news.title: 高瓴出手了一家消费级柔性机器人公司，要把“大白”从电影搬进现实家庭｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，消费级柔性机器人公司SoulX日前已完成数千万元天使轮融资，投资方为高瓴创投，向阳资本担任独家财务顾问。资金将重点投入产品持续迭代、技术研发，并加快供应链与规模化交付体系搭建。首款机器人产品MoYa将于2026年下半年正式发布。

SoulX隶属于深圳市弘火智能科技有限公司，团队长期专注于柔性机器人技术与睡眠、压力与家庭健康关护。公司以睡眠场景为切入点，自主研发了睡眠安抚机器人MoYa。该产品融合机器人技术、神经科学与心理学，采用无摄像头设计，通过模拟拥抱帮助用户缓解身心压力。

家庭场景下的情感与健康关护，长期面临一个“人机关系”设计上的根本问题：在需要身心双重安抚的场景里，机器应该以怎样的方式“在场”？

过去几年，不同产品从多个维度给出答案。智能床垫、白噪音机擅长改善环境与生理舒适度；可穿戴设备精于睡眠数据的连续监测；毛绒玩具在情绪投射与安全感的建立上有天然优势；新兴的AI对话机器人则在更自然的表达，促进沟通方面快速迭代。

触觉安抚传递物

chinese_news.title: 曼联，要被卖了
chinese_news.summary:
图片来源：视觉中国

作者/余梦莹

报道/投资界PEdaily

史上最盛大世界杯正在上演。

48支球队、39天、104场比赛，总奖金飙升至8.71亿美元。梅西、C罗、莫德里奇“最后一舞”，哈兰德、姆巴佩、亚马尔崛起，诸神之战拉开帷幕。

赛场之外，一家老牌足球豪门却站在了十字路口——彭博社消息，掌控英超球队曼联超20年的格雷泽家族内部，近期正在讨论出售事宜。

绰号“红魔”，这是英格兰足球史上最富盛名的豪门。

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑
chinese_news.summary:
在AI浪潮重塑全球产业逻辑的当下，传统留学路径所依赖的学历溢价与信息差正在系统性失效，大量高薪专业的基础性任务面临被AI批量化替代的风险。70/80后家长遭遇教育投资回报率骤降，05后年轻一代则陷入人机协同时代“何以确立自身不可替代价值”的身份焦虑。面对旧共识瓦解、新航线未明的历史性分水岭，36氪研究院与新通教育联合发布《AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑》。白皮书基于新通三十年积累的百万级家庭服务数据及36氪研究院对2030年全球新兴产业集群的前瞻研判，倡导回归全生命周期的长期主义，为留学家庭提供一份客观、中立的未来就业生存指南。

从“向外破局”到“向内扎根”：中国留学生三十年心理变迁史

中国留学行业三十年，其底层逻辑是一部中产家庭的教育焦虑与价值观重塑史。留学意义经历了五个阶段的变迁——从生存驱动、打破信息垄断的拓荒破冰，到追逐名校光环的晋升通道，再到就业预期前置的工具理性内卷，继而转入风险规避与心理议题凸显的疫情重塑期，直至当下AI浪潮中意义感赤字、情感支撑成为刚需的新阶段。

chinese_news.title: “宁王系”，排队 IPO
chinese_news.summary:
越来越多CVC在路上

作者 | 冯晓亭 

 编辑 | 吾人

近日，中恒电气发布关于控股股东签署《战略投资合作框架协议》事项的进展公告。公告显示，公司控股股东杭州中恒科技投资有限公司（简称“中恒科技投资”）引进宁德时代新能源科技股份有限公司（简称“宁德时代”）的战略投资事宜正在有序推进中，宁德时代拟以40.9985882353亿元（约“41亿元”）认

chinese_news.title: 读懂SpaceX的两万亿故事：为什么马斯克每一手棋，永远都可以提前摆好？
chinese_news.summary:
飞向宇宙、浩瀚无垠

作者｜曹思颀

编辑｜靖宇

6 月 12 日，在 SpaceX 正式挂牌当天，马斯克选择前往得州的星舰基地，和数百名员工一起，远程敲响了纳斯达克的开市钟。

在现场，他用熟悉的那股自嘲范儿说：「如果当年有人告诉我会有今天，我大概率觉得那个人嗑嗨了。因为当时我自己都认为这家公司会黄。」

这一天，SpaceX 正式登陆纳斯达克，发行价 135 美元，募资约 750 亿美元；

chinese_news.title: 突发！Anthropic全球停用Claude 5
chinese_news.summary:
究竟为何，Anthropic突然下线了地表最强Claude？

【导读】上线72小时，最强Claude Fable 5被一纸禁令全球下架，连Anthropic自家外籍员工都不许碰。

太突然了！

就在刚刚，Anthropic官宣——

全球禁用外籍人士对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的所有访问权限。

无论是在美国境内还是境外，就连Anthropic的外籍员工，全都不可用。

上线才3天的Clau

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 核心材料成本降至进口材料五分之一，电致变色技术厂商获投，车规级产线建设中
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，中科电墨近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由西安龙鼎投资独家投资。本轮融资将主要用于车规级电致变色产线建设、核心材料研发迭代以及汽车领域市场拓展。

伴随新能源汽车向智能化、舒适化方向升级，汽车玻璃正从传统结构件逐步演变为集隔热、防晒、隐私保护和交互体验于一体的功能件。尤其是全景天幕快速普及后，调光玻璃开始成为车企提升产品差异化的重要配置之一。

目前市场主流调光技术主要包括PDLC（液晶调光）、SPD（悬浮粒子调光）以及EC（电致变色）三种路线。PDLC和SPD主要依靠光散射实现遮蔽效果，普遍存在雾度较高、隔热能力有限、驱动电压较高等问题。而电致变色技术则通过材料发生氧化还原反应，实现玻璃透光率变化，不仅能够实现连续调光，同时具备低雾度、低能耗以及隔绝红外热辐射等优势，被认为是下一代智能玻璃的重要技术路线之一。

中科电墨成立于2023年，专注于电致变色核心材料及器件研发。公司首席科学家马明明博士长期从事导电高分子材料研究，于2017年成功研发出相关核心材料体系。通过引入自主设计的导电聚合物材料，中科电墨突破了长期由海外

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 by end of May 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran peace deal narrative (Trump's Sunday deadline) driving safe-haven flow reversal; BTC already above $64k on deal momentum, but timing risk if negotiations stall.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin rises above $64,000 after Pakistan prime minister says Iran peace deal is near'; Trump Truth Social statement on Sunday signing.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX stock (SPACEX) be in the S&P 500 by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX IPO just closed at $2T market cap (6th largest US company), creating immediate tailwinds for index inclusion; TD Securities expects larger moves ahead.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company' post-IPO; 'TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX.'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anthropic Claude models (all versions) remain restricted by U.S. export controls through Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Anthropic just disabled Fable 5 and Mythos 5 under government directive; Amazon warning reportedly triggered crackdown, signaling escalating AI export scrutiny.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/36Kr: 'Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5'; 36Kr: 'Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models'; Cointelegraph: 'Anthropic Mythos AI finds no serious bugs in Zcash.'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the USD Index (DXY) fall below 100 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran peace deal narrative reduces geopolitical risk premium in USD; potential for capital reallocation to risk assets and EM currencies if deal holds.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Trump/BBC statements on Iran deal Sunday signing; crypto market response showing risk-on sentiment (BTC rally).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Switzerland's population-cap referendum pass on first vote in May 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Vote happening imminently; outcome will materially affect CHF valuation and EU free-movement treaty negotiations; high retail interest but technical complexity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC/CNBC: 'Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million'; Swiss People's Party 'sustainability initiative' framing vs. opposition 'chaos' narrative.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Iran-US peace deal be officially signed and announced by June 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official statements from U.S. State Department, Iranian Foreign Ministry, or UN Security Council; credible Reuters/AP newswire confirmation.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump's definitive Sunday (May 5) claim vs. Iran's public caution creates binary binary outcome with high implied vol; market currently pricing 60-70% but geopolitical tail risk (military escalation, negotiation collapse) deserves wider spreads.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump's Truth Social post claiming Sunday signing; Iranian officials casting doubt on timing; Biden-era legacy political pressure to close deal before 2026 mid-term cycle.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's realized volatility (30-day rolling) exceed 45% annualized by July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Coin Metrics or CryptoQuant 30-day historical volatility data; Polymarket may reference CBOE Bitcoin Volatility Index (BVIX) derivatives.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SpaceX IPO narrative and geopolitical deal flow (Iran, Ukraine, Taiwan) could trigger institutional risk-off cascades; implied vol in crypto options currently underpricing tail hedges given macro regime transition.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO creating FOMO and retail leverage; Trump peace deal binary outcomes; Fed policy uncertainty; Anthropic AI export restrictions raising tech sector volatility.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic's combined restricted model revenue (Fable, Mythos, Claude restricted) drop below 20% of Q2 2026 total Anthropic revenue by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Anthropic earnings/investor update; third-party analyst reports (Pitchbook, Pareto Intelligence); SEC filings if Anthropic enters public markets.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Export controls are accelerating; enterprise customers may substitute with open-source or non-restricted models; Anthropic's valuation may face repricing if revenue concentration in unrestricted products reveals weakness.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr exclusive: Amazon warning + government directive; Cointelegraph: Mythos finding 'no serious bugs' suggests limited current deployment; China-focused tech sanctions regime tightening (Swiss referendums, EU GDPR-adjacent AI Act enforcement).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Mag8 (Magnificent 8) tech stocks' collective Bitcoin holdings exceed 10% of total corporate Bitcoin supply by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Ark Invest Bitcoin Holdings tracker; Microstrategy press releases; SEC 13-F filings (Q3 2026 and Q4 2026); CryptoQuant on-chain analytics of known corporate wallets.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Saylor memo ('Thanks to you, 25% of Mag8 firms now hold bitcoin') signals inflection point; SpaceX IPO may accelerate Musk's BTC integration; retail/institutional cascade into corporate treasuries underappreciated.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of Mag8 firms now hold bitcoin'; SpaceX IPO + $1.3B Bitcoin reserve public disclosure driving copycat C-suite behavior.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will tokenization-focused DeFi assets (e.g., RWA tokens, permissioned staking platforms) collectively capture >$50B in TVL by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DeFi Llama TVL rankings for RWA and tokenization categories; Ondo Finance investor updates; Bloomberg Terminal RWA market reports.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk: 'Tokenization mirrors $20 trillion ETF boom as blockchain and AI converge'; perpetual futures also cited as 'crypto's next ETF moment'—implies massive category expansion; market currently pricing slow institutional adoption but narrative momentum is accelerating.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Ondo exec commentary on tokenization-AI convergence; Morpho's $175M raise showing VC capital flow into DeFi infra; SpaceX public status enabling corporate tokenization pilots; regulatory clarity on Reg A+/Reg D tokenization in Q2-Q3 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Risk-on sentiment from Iran peace deal narrative will drive BTC/ETH outperformance vs. DXY-linked assets through June 2026, with tactical profit-taking risk if deal collapses.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin rises above $64,000 after Pakistan prime minister says Iran peace deal is near'
Trump Truth Social: definitive Sunday signing claim (vs. Tehran caution) creates binary event volatility
Saylor commentary shows Mag8 firms adding BTC (institutional tailwind post-SPX rumors)
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal repeatedly collapses at last minute (2015 precedent); geopolitical escalation or military incident could trigger sudden risk-off and BTC crash to $58k–$60k within days.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps (5–10x leverage, tight stops) OR long ETH/BTC ratio (expects ETH catch-up on AI-stablecoin narrative) through June 15 at $BTC > $65k exit target; hedge with OTM June puts at $60k.

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX public status creates structural demand for Tesla, MicroStrategy, and bitcoin-heavy Mag8 stock as copycat corporate treasury narratives spread; tech sector rotation into 'Musk ecosystem' plays.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company' post-IPO, triggering index inclusion speculation
TD Securities: 'SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline' (implies M&A, spinoffs, or satellite business carve-outs)
CoinDesk: Saylor memo on 25% of Mag8 holding BTC shows narrative momentum; SpaceX's $1.3B BTC reserve disclosure accelerates cultural shift
investment_theses.counter_view: SpaceX IPO faces post-IPO lock-up unwinding (typically 6–12 months); Musk's fractious Twitter/X ownership and regulatory scrutiny on starship safety could depress SPACEX multiples; macro slowdown could kill FOMO.
investment_theses.expression: Long TSLA (tech/Musk narrative play) or MicroStrategy (MSTR) via call spreads; long SPY overweighting XLK on S&P index rebalance expectations; alternatively, long BTC perps as pure corporate treasury liquidity indicator (looser correlation to macro).

investment_theses.thesis: U.S. AI export controls (Anthropic, other frontier labs) are forcing strategic redirection to domestic/allied-only deployment; this creates arbitrage for open-source AI tokens (GLM, other on HN trending) and reduces Anthropic/OpenAI valuations if revenue cap-down is large.
supporting_signals: 36Kr exclusive: Amazon warning triggered U.S. government crackdown on Anthropic's Fable 5, Mythos 5
CNBC: 'Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with export control directive'
Cointelegraph: Mythos AI use-case (Zcash auditing) shows limited current deployment; enterprise churn likely if US-only versions lag global competitors
investment_theses.counter_view: Anthropic pivots to domestic enterprise/government sales (DoD, NSA contracts) and actually grows revenue despite geographic restrictions; OpenAI's closed system + government relationships insulate it from export controls.
investment_theses.expression: Underweight NVDA on AI export control spillover (data center demand hits foreign buyers); overweight cybersecurity/defense tech ETFs (ITA, XAR) that benefit from domestic AI buildout; long TAO or other decentralized AI compute tokens as hedge to centralized Anthropic/OpenAI control.

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum-based institutional products (stablecoins, tokenized RWAs, perpetuals infrastructure) are capturing Wall Street's transition from 'crypto pilots' to 'core finance infrastructure' at a faster clip than Bitcoin; ETH/BTC ratio likely to expand into Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Wall Street is moving past crypto pilots and deeper into Ethereum, says Etherealize founder'
CoinDesk: 'Tokenization mirrors the $20 trillion ETF boom as blockchain and AI converge, Ondo exec says'
CoinDesk: 'Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment' (implies leveraged Ethereum infrastructure build-out)
Morpho's $175M raise shows VC capital flooding into ETH-native DeFi
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum scalability and UX remain fragmented (competing L2s, bridges); Bitcoin's institutional adoption (corporate treasuries, ETFs) will outpace ETH; Ethereum's staking yield compression reduces carry appeal.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via ETH call spreads + BTC put spreads OR long ETHUSDT spot with 15–20% upside target through August; pair trade: long Ethereum staking derivatives (rETH, stETH) against short Bitcoin or long BTC-denominated stables (UBTC if liquid).

investment_theses.thesis: China's robotics/AI hardware buildout (36Kr: SoulX humanoid robot funding by Hillhouse, MoYa launch H2 2026; electrochromic glass for EVs) is signaling capital reallocation from crypto speculation back into hard-tech VC; this may cool crypto token demand and favor equities exposure to Chinese tech supply chains.
supporting_signals: 36Kr exclusive: SoulX (Hillhouse-backed humanoid robot) raising millions; MoYa robot launch H2 2026—signals pre-revenue VC capital concentration
36Kr: 中科电墨 (electrochromic glass startup) raising Pre-A for EV applications (smart sunroof); material cost at 1/5 of imports—indicates supply-chain consolidation play
36Kr: H&M reorganization, 'Ningwang ecosystem' IPOs queuing—signals traditional retail/industrial capital reallocation away from crypto into consumer tech/manufacturing
investment_theses.counter_view: China's VCs are diversifying, not exiting crypto; blockchain supply-chain integration (Zcash audits by Anthropic, tokenization) still early; regulatory clarity on CNY-stablecoin could unlock massive domestic adoption.
investment_theses.expression: Underweight trending crypto tokens (PENGU, VELVET, BP—retail gaming tokens on low volume); overweight semiconductor/robotics-exposed ETFs (SMH, XSD); if China plays: long Alibaba (BABA) cloud / Tencent (TCEHY) AI; short speculative low-cap crypto (e.g., SIREN, Humanity) on poor fundame narratives.

FLAG_CHINESE_SOURCES_AHEAD_OF_ENGLISH.story: Anthropic AI model restrictions (Fable 5, Mythos 5 disabled by U.S. government directive)
FLAG_CHINESE_SOURCES_AHEAD_OF_ENGLISH.english_lag: 36Kr reported 'Amazon warning triggered US crackdown' BEFORE English media clarified scope; Cointelegraph followed with partial coverage. Full enterprise impact (customer churn, revenue cap) not yet priced in Western financial media.
FLAG_CHINESE_SOURCES_AHEAD_OF_ENGLISH.implication: Anthropic's Q2 2026 earnings may miss if export restrictions cut deeper than disclosed; watch for 36Kr follow-ups on Anthropic's Asia/EU customer cancellations.

FLAG_CHINESE_SOURCES_AHEAD_OF_ENGLISH.story: SpaceX IPO and broader Musk ecosystem narrative impact on Chinese VC allocation
FLAG_CHINESE_SOURCES_AHEAD_OF_ENGLISH.english_lag: 36Kr's analytical piece ('读懂SpaceX的两万亿故事') dissects Musk's strategic sequencing of IPOs, M&A, and tokenization—context that English financial media has not yet synthesized for crypto/macro traders.
FLAG_CHINESE_SOURCES_AHEAD_OF_ENGLISH.implication: Chinese VCs may be faster to identify which Mag8 companies will copy SpaceX's Bitcoin treasury strategy; watch 36Kr for coverage of Alibaba, Tencent, or Baidu Bitcoin holdings announcements.
